title: Pebble
theme: Pebble becomes one of the memories that survives.
sceneDescription: Chapter 4 is presented as a privacy-safe stylized memoir scene using warm table light, quiet cafe ambience, remembered objects. The Living Scene Layer supports the memory without changing the manuscript text or recreating real people photorealistically.
privacyNotes: Use privacy-safe, stylized, non-photorealistic character presence. Do not create final faces unless explicitly approved.
